conflicts.reason: Rules R1 and R4 have overlapping conditions on field(s) [transaction_amount] but prescribe different actions: "flag" vs "block". When both trigger simultaneously, the more restrictive action (block > flag > allow) should take precedence.

Rule R1 subsumes Rule R8. R1 has fewer conditions and acts as a broader version, rendering the additional conditions in R8 potentially redundant.
Rule R4 subsumes Rule R5. R4 has fewer conditions and acts as a broader version, rendering the additional conditions in R5 potentially redundant.

gap_analysis.reason: No rules currently evaluate the "cumulative_amount_24h" field. Rolling 24-hour monetary velocity is a recommended compliance dimension.
